description_long: This is a geometric, hexagonal shelving unit constructed with a black metal frame and three flat, rectangular wooden shelves. The open-frame design creates a visually striking, modern appearance, with the shelves suspended within the hexagonal outline. The wood surfaces are a rich brown, contrasting with the matte black metal supports at each corner. The structure is open on all sides, allowing for easy access and display of items from multiple angles. The overall form is minimalist, with no doors, handles, or enclosed compartments, making it ideal for displaying decorative objects or storing books. Its sturdy construction suggests it could be used both indoors and in sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, hexagonal shelving unit with a black metal frame and three brown wooden shelves, open on all sides for display and storage. The design is minimalist and visually striking, suitable for urban interiors or sheltered outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: The shelving unit is seen from the narrow end, showing the depth of the shelves and the open hexagonal frame.
description_view_1: The full hexagonal profile is visible, with all three wooden shelves clearly displayed within the black metal frame.
description_view_2: Another narrow end view, similar to view 0, emphasizing the depth and open structure of the shelves.
description_view_3: The opposite hexagonal side is shown, mirroring view 1, with the shelves and frame fully visible.
